positive: A vibrant, symmetrical celestial mandal artwork featuring stylized planets, nebula swirls, and constellations forming an intricate, circular design. The style is neo-tribal geometric mixed with psychedelic vaporwave elements. Use deep cosmic blues, electric magentas, vibrant teal accents, and glowing gold foil textures for high contrast. The composition must be perfectly centered, creating a strong, mesmerizing focal point suitable for apparel printing. Clean lines, sharp edges, and detailed radial symmetry are essential. Studio lighting, high resolution, vector graphic quality.
negative: blurry, artifacts, noise, text, watermark, logo, signature, messy, low contrast, bad anatomy, extra limbs, asymmetrical, jpeg artifacts
